## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Worked example
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / scripts
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the convention (`skill/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, etc.)
- [ ] Skill files have valid front matter (`name` and `description`)
- [ ] New skills are in their own folder under `skills/`
- [ ] No sensitive data included (API keys, tokens, personal info)
- [ ] `bash ~/dotfiles/bin/bootstrap.sh` runs cleanly after these changes
- [ ] PR description explains what changed and why

## For new skills — answer these

**What triggers this skill?**
<!-- What does the user say or what situation calls for it? -->

**What does it produce?**
<!-- What output should the agent generate? -->

**Have you run it?**
<!-- Yes / No — and if yes, briefly what happened -->

## For worked examples — answer these

**What problem does this architecture solve?**

**Why this structure vs. alternatives?**

**What would you change after running it in production?**

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs context, known limitations, follow-up issues, etc. -->
